task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "打开微信应用查看目标文章"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "点击右上角的三点菜单按钮"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "选择复制链接选项（或通过分享间接获取链接）"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "将链接粘贴到桌面浏览器中进行测试"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "检查链接是否需要登录、无效或显示文章内容"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "针对受限链接，仅能在微信应用内访问"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "对于外部网站链接，确认其正常工作"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "使用URL解短工具处理缩短的链接"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "联系原作者获取可公开访问的直接链接"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "action"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "selectOption"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "pasteLink"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "testLink"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "handleRestrictedAccess"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node7", "type": "confirmExternalLink"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node8", "type": "unshortenLink"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node9", "type": "requestDirectLink"}]}
